title: Sai Steps Forward
description: Pages 13–14 focus on sai steps forward, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the battles against Doflamingo's officers intensify as the allies begin turning Dressrosa's chaos into victories.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Fly, fly away to the kingdom of the gods!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm ten thousand freaking tons! Ni- hihihi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Graha Aaha a a a a aah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I guess he isn't flying anywhere, anytime soon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: He's gonna hit the bird cage! Vise-sama! Stop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Well, not like he's a bird or anything.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: sweet dreams, giant. When you're done counting sheep,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: The pride of Elbaf Burns Bright!

summary: Sai Steps Forward advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
